entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop studied for Fe and Zn content.

entities.name: GRAIN FE
entities.description: Iron content in the grain of sorghum.

entities.name: GRAIN ZN
entities.description: Zinc content in the grain of sorghum.

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General characteristics related to crop growth and yield.

entities.name: ICRISAT GENE BANK
entities.description: The gene bank where the sorghum accessions are maintained.

entities.name: ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Individual plant lines within the sorghum collection.

entities.name: WHITE GRAINS
entities.description: Sorghum grains with a white color.

entities.name: COLORED GRAINS
entities.description: Sorghum grains with a color other than white.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country of origin for some white grain sorghums.

entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: Country of origin for some white grain sorghums.

entities.name: TESTA
entities.description: The seed coat of the sorghum grain.

entities.name: ENDOSPERM TEXTURE
entities.description: The texture of the endosperm, the starchy part of the grain.

entities.name: GRAIN SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the sorghum grain.

entities.name: AGRO-CLIMATIC REGIONS
entities.description: Areas defined by climate and agricultural conditions.

relationships.weight: Grain Fe content is a trait of sorghum.
Grain Zn content is a trait of sorghum.
Agronomic traits are studied in relation to sorghum.
The accessions are maintained in the ICRISAT gene bank.
White grain sorghums originated from India.
White grain sorghums originated from Zimbabwe.
Endosperm texture influences grain Fe content.
Endosperm texture influences grain Zn content.
Grain size influences grain Fe content.
Grain size influences grain Zn content.
Sorghum can be bred for different agro-climatic regions.
Grain Fe and Zn contents are positively correlated.
Grain Fe has a weak association with agronomic traits.
Grain Zn has a weak association with agronomic traits.
